raw_consumer_statement: Citi Bank Credit Card. I discovered fraudulent charges on my card XX/XX/XXXX for a purchase made on XXXX on XX/XX/XXXX. I immediately canceled the card and made a dispute of the charges. I have received their response saying since I have bought from ticket master before and that whoever used my card had my name and address correct as well it must be me ( the email they had was not mine where I assume the tickets were delivered ). According to Citis response the charges were made in XXXX, CO for an event on XX/XX/XXXX in New York. My statement for the card proves by charges being made here in Utah for both the purchase and event date that I was not in XXXX to buy them or New York to attend the event. I have emailed them again to look into the charges because it was not me.
